cascade-heights.name: Cascade Heights
cascade-heights.amenities: Rooftop terrace, resort-style pool, fitness center, coworking lounge, EV charging stations, package lockers
cascade-heights.pet_policy: Cats and dogs welcome. Max 2 pets per unit. $500 pet deposit, $50/month pet rent. Breed restrictions apply — no dogs over 75 lbs.
cascade-heights.parking: Assigned underground garage. $150/month per space. One space included with 2-bed and 3-bed units.
cascade-heights.lease_terms: 12-month leases standard. 6-month available at a 10% premium. Month-to-month after initial term at $200/month premium.
cascade-heights.utilities: Water and trash included. Residents pay electricity and internet separately.
cascade-heights.move_in_costs: First month's rent, last month's rent, and a $500 security deposit due at signing.
cascade-heights.application_process: Online application at cascadeheights.com. $50 application fee. Background and credit check required. Typically 2 business days to process.
cascade-heights.neighborhood: Walking distance to Bellevue Square, Lincoln Square, and Meydenbauer Bay Park. 5-minute drive to I-405 and SR-520.

the-meridian.name: The Meridian
the-meridian.amenities: Fitness center, bike storage, courtyard with BBQ grills, Amazon Hub locker, on-site laundry
the-meridian.pet_policy: Cats and small dogs (under 40 lbs) welcome. Max 1 pet per unit. $350 pet deposit, $35/month pet rent.
the-meridian.parking: Surface lot. First space free with lease. Additional spaces $75/month.
the-meridian.lease_terms: 12-month leases only. Month-to-month available after initial term at $150/month premium.
the-meridian.utilities: Water and trash included. Residents pay electricity and internet.
the-meridian.move_in_costs: First month's rent and $400 security deposit due at signing. Last month optional.
the-meridian.application_process: Online application at themeridianredmond.com. $40 application fee. Credit and background check. Typically 1–2 business days.
the-meridian.neighborhood: Walking distance to the Overlake Transit Center (Link Light Rail). Close to Microsoft campus, Whole Foods, and Marymoor Park.

pineview-commons.name: Pineview Commons
pineview-commons.office_hours: Monday–Friday 9am–5pm, Saturday by appointment only, Sunday closed
pineview-commons.amenities: Playground, picnic area, on-site laundry, ample surface parking
pineview-commons.parking: Free street parking and unassigned surface lot.
pineview-commons.lease_terms: 12-month leases standard. No short-term options currently available.
pineview-commons.utilities: Water and trash included. Residents pay electricity and internet.
pineview-commons.move_in_costs: First month's rent and $300 security deposit due at signing.
pineview-commons.application_process: Paper or online application available. $30 application fee. Background check required. Processing takes 2–3 business days.
pineview-commons.neighborhood: Quiet residential neighborhood near Juanita Bay Park and Lake Washington. 10-minute drive to downtown Kirkland. Bus routes 224 and 255 nearby.
